instructions.title: MASTER LAUNCH - creatives + 2 separate LIVE campaigns (PeningBot & PeningLab, Sales)
instructions.instruction:
MASTER LAUNCH RUNBOOK - EXECUTE EACH STEP EXACTLY. Do NOT re-plan; every decision is made. Build TWO SEPARATE campaigns (one per brand) - different pixel, different creatives, NEVER shared. Both LIVE at exactly RM4/day each. Objective = website SALES -> Purchase. Per the 2026 playbook at this budget: ONE CBO + ONE ad set + 3 distinct creative entities (Andromeda diversity) per brand, 3 different angles, 2 images + 1 video. If a tool errors, retry once then continue with what succeeded; only STOP (and WhatsApp owner) if the ad account is not writable.

STEP 1 - peninglab balance: get_balance. If < RM5, WhatsApp owner and STOP. Generation budget ~RM4.

STEP 2 - GENERATE 6 creatives via peninglab, Fire-and-Poll (fire all in parallel; poll get_status by task_id; NEVER re-generate a slot with a task_id). Save each asset URL.
PENINGBOT (WhatsApp-green #25D366, Bahasa Melayu) - 3 angles:
 PB1 IMAGE gpt-image-2 (angle: fear/problem): "Realistic 1:1 mobile ad. Dark bedroom 3am, phone glowing on nightstand showing a WhatsApp chat list flooded with 99+ unread + red badges, blurred sleeping owner behind. Malay headline overlay: 'Customer WhatsApp pukul 3 pagi, esok beli kat orang lain'. WhatsApp-green #25D366 accents, text in safe zone, no watermark."
 PB2 IMAGE gpt-image-2 (angle: comparison): "Clean 1:1 comparison table, dark bg + green #25D366. 'Balas Manual' vs 'PeningBot': Reply time 2 jam / 2 saat; After-hours Tutup / 24 jam; Sales Rugi / Closing automatik. Bold Malay, safe zone, no watermark."
 PB3 VIDEO gemini 10s 9:16 (angle: founder/solution): "10s vertical UGC, Malaysian male SME owner 30s in a small shop holding a phone, warm daylight, handheld, film grain. Dialogue BM lip-synced: 'Penat balas WhatsApp sampai pukul 3 pagi? PeningBot balas customer automatik 24 jam dalam 2 saat. Cuba di peningbot dot com.' (no subtitles)"
PENINGLAB (dark #0a0a0a + orange #f97316 + lime #c8f53e, Bahasa Melayu) - 3 angles:
 PL1 IMAGE gpt-image-2 (angle: before/after cost): "Bold 1:1 split, dark bg + orange/lime. LEFT BEFORE: tired creator w/ camera, 'RM500 . 1 minggu . 1 video'. RIGHT AFTER: phone with grid of 10 TikTok thumbnails, 'RM0.40 . 3 minit . 10 video'. Energetic Malay, safe zone, no watermark."
 PL2 IMAGE gpt-image-2 (angle: competitor FOMO): "Dynamic 1:1, dark + orange/lime. TikTok feed: a competitor posting 10 videos in a day vs one lonely video. Malay headline 'Kompetitor post 10 video sehari guna AI'. Energetic, safe zone, no watermark."
 PL3 VIDEO gemini 10s 9:16 (angle: demo): "10s vertical screen-record, dark UI orange accents: a hand pastes a TikTok Shop link, 10 UGC thumbnails generate fast. Dialogue BM VO lip-synced: 'Bayar RM300 untuk satu video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit, RM0.40 sebijik. Cuba di peninglab dot com.' (no subtitles)"

STEP 3 - RESOLVE via zernio: accounts_list_accounts(platform=metaads) -> social account _id; ads_list_ad_accounts -> MYR account act_943036532064443 ('Pening'); connect_list_facebook_pages -> page id of 'bisnesowner2021'. Confirm write access (list campaigns). If not writable, STOP + WhatsApp owner.

STEP 4 - CREATE PENINGBOT campaign (zernio ads_create_standalone_ad): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'986352420917190', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 986352420917190; budget_amount=4 budget_type=daily budget_level=campaign (CBO); countries=['MY'] age_min=25 age_max=45 broad (NO detailed interests); page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peningbot.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 3 ads:
  A (PB1): primary='Penat balas WhatsApp lewat malam? Customer tunggu, esok dah beli kat orang lain. PeningBot auto-reply 24/7 dalam 2 saat - setup 5 minit. Dari RM35/bulan.' headline='Auto-reply WhatsApp 24/7'
  B (PB2): primary='Balas lambat = customer lari. PeningBot jawab automatik 24 jam, tangkap setiap lead. Setup 5 minit, dari RM35/bulan.' headline='Stop kehilangan sales lewat malam'
  C (PB3 video): primary='Owner kedai? Berhenti balas WhatsApp sorang-sorang. PeningBot auto-reply 24/7, dari RM35/bulan.' headline='Auto-reply 24/7 - 5 minit setup'
 Campaign name: 'PeningBot - Sales - launch'.

STEP 5 - CREATE PENINGLAB campaign (SEPARATE campaign): goal=conversions; promoted_object={pixelId:'1013990424497184', customEventType:'PURCHASE'}; tracking pixel 1013990424497184; budget RM4/day CBO; countries=['MY'] age_min=22 age_max=40 broad; page=bisnesowner2021; link_url='https://peninglab.com'; call_to_action='LEARN_MORE'; status=ACTIVE. ONE ad set, 3 ads:
  A (PL1): primary='Bayar RM300 untuk 1 video je? Paste link TikTok Shop, dapat 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. RM0.40 sebijik.' headline='10 video UGC dalam 3 minit'
  B (PL2): primary='Kompetitor mass-post guna AI. Kau masih shoot manual? Generate 10 video UGC sehari, RM0.40 sebijik. Scale TikTok Shop kau.' headline='Scale TikTok Shop dengan AI'
  C (PL3 video): primary='Seller TikTok Shop - generate 10 video UGC dalam 3 minit. Mula RM35/bulan.' headline='10 video / 3 minit'
 Campaign name: 'PeningLab - Sales - launch'. (If 'LEARN_MORE' rejected, use 'SIGN_UP'.)

STEP 6 - NOTIFY + LOG: WhatsApp owner via whacenter (number $WHACENTER_DEFAULT_TO): one message: 'LIVE: PeningBot + PeningLab campaigns (separate) launched. RM4/day each, objective Sales. Campaign ids + 6 creative URLs: ...'. Append full report (URLs, campaign/ad ids, errors) to _shared/reports/launch.md.

HARD RULES: two SEPARATE campaigns; never share pixel/creative between brands; both LIVE at exactly RM4/day; do not exceed budget; do NOT analyse existing ads (there are none) - pure create+launch.
